title: Valaraukar
description: A Fabric client-side modpack that polishes Minecraft into a buttery-smooth, eye-candy-filled, stress-free zone. (VulkanMod, Lithium, FerriteCore ...) Better than OptiFine and Sodium.
body:
# Why This Exists

Minecraft runs fine. Minecraft that flies on a 10-year-old laptop and still looks gorgeous? Now we're talking.
This pack ditches shaders, but keeps everything else that matters: silky FPS on potato rigs, server-crushing performance and subtle beauty that makes vanilla feel intentional. No jet-engine fans. No hollow optimization. Just Minecraft—fixed, polished, and ready to play.

## Highlights
### 🚀 Performance? Optimized.

- VulkanMod: Uncapped FPS sorcery. Playable on a toaster. _Probably_.
- Lithium + FerriteCore + Krypton: Optimization trio that makes Minecraft forget it’s made of Java.
- Consumable Optimizer + LazyDFU Reloaded: Smoother world loads and saves—no more "why did my game freeze for 3 seconds?"

### ✨ Visual Bliss

- Visuality + ScalableLux: Skies with mood, light that breathes—no shaders needed to feel immersed.
- PresenceFootsteps: Fancy footstep sounds because _immersion_.
- LambdaBetterGrass + Motschen's Better Leaves + Connected Bricks: Nature that looks intentional—no more jarring grass edges or lonely bricks.
- Dark GUI Experience: Gentle on the eyes, easy on the soul. Dark mode out of the box.

### 🎮 Quality of Life Upgrades

- InventoryProfilesNext + MouseTweaks: Organize your chests like a Tetris grandmaster.
- Zoomify for creepin’ on creepers, ShulkerBoxTooltip to avoid inventory Jenga, and Jade to finally know what that weird block is.
- Stfu (bye, useless narration) + Debugify: For squashing bugs Mojang forgot existed.
  
### ⚠️ Trade-Offs
- No Shaders: Iris is gone. _But hey, 1000 FPS!_
- Missing Mods: see [VulkanMod’s incompatibility list](https://github.com/xCollateral/VulkanMod/wiki/Incompatible-mods)

## Installation
1. Install Fabric.
1. Dump these mods into your mods folder.
1. Cry happy tears as your FPS counter becomes a flex.

> 💡 *Pro Tip:* Set `vsync: false` in graphics settings for 1000+ frames. Your monitor may blush.

## Contributions & Feedback
Spotted a mod that makes drowned 47% more dramatic? Open a issue! Bribes accepted in the form of:
- Coffee ☕
- Pixel art of a creeper meditating peacefully
- Philosophical debates about whether gravel really needs to exist
